changelog: Admin UI: unified single table for Images, Flavors, Projects, Security Groups, Storage Policies — saved items shown checked, Load from API appends unchecked new items, uncheck with confirmation removes
Admin: Region selector dropdown on Images and Flavors tabs for region-filtered API loading
Admin: Security Groups tab now accessible (was coded but not wired to nav)
Admin: New Storage Policies (Volume Types) tab with load/save support
Admin: Create Config Group now shows all existing config groups with edit links; Storage Policy included as 4th option in new groups
Admin: Dashboard shows Security Group and Storage Policy counts
Module Settings: Storage Policy (Volume Type) loader now reads from admin-saved selection, fixing blank dropdown
Module Settings: Added IP Assignment config option (IPv4/IPv6/Both)
Module Settings: Added Network config option with loader
Fix: listVolumes called with stale empty-string region arg in hooks.php
Fix: Nameserver prefix validation error on order — JS now pre-fills ns1prefix/ns2prefix so WHMCS validation passes
Fix: Release description overflow — removed white-space:pre-wrap, li items wrapped in ul
API: listRegions(), listNetworks() added; region_id param added to listFlavors/listImages
